title: Dental plan datasets:  Small businesses (SHOP)
meta-description: Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP) dental plan datasets for researchers
bite: Dental coverage is available with some of the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP) health plans, but it’s not included in all of them. You can buy a separate dental plan through the SHOP Marketplace, which is also available to employees who buy a SHOP Marketplace health plan at the same time. If you need to access data on SHOP dental plans, you can download it from the appropriate source below.
excerpt: Dental coverage is available with some of the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP) health plans, but it’s not included in all of them. You can buy a separate dental plan through the SHOP Marketplace, which is also available to employees who buy a SHOP Marketplace health plan at the same time. If you need to access data on SHOP dental plans, you can download it from the appropriate source below.
content:
Dental coverage is available with some of the Small Business Health Options Program (SHOP) health plans, but it’s not included in all of them. You can buy a separate dental plan through the SHOP Marketplace, which is also available to employees who buy a SHOP Marketplace health plan at the same time. If you need to access data on SHOP dental plans, you can download it from the appropriate source below.

2026 SHOP dental plan data (ZIP file, 66.1 KB)
2026 instructions (PDF, 196 KB)

2025 SHOP dental plan data (ZIP file, 71.5 KB)
2025 instructions (PDF, 208 KB)

2024 SHOP dental plan data (ZIP file, 73.2 KB)
2024 instructions (PDF, 163 KB)

2015 plan information is also available for:

  • Nevada (ZIP file, 118 KB)

2014 SHOP dental plan data (ZIP file, 19.1 MB)

2014 plan information is also available for:

More resources for:

Researchers
Get more detailed plan information with Health Insurance Marketplace® Public Use Files. These files provide extensive data on the plans available to consumers through the Federally-facilitated Marketplace.

Developers
Access additional dataset files. Get HealthCare.gov data on individual and small group medical and dental plans, as well as Marketplace-certified local help and community provider lists.
